designs.title: Login as Administrator with valid credentials
designs.description: Test that Administrator can log in with correct credentials
expected_outcomes: Login as Administrator with valid credentials succeeds

designs.title: Reject invalid password for Administrator
designs.description: Test that Administrator cannot log in with wrong password

steps.rationale: Attempt login as Administrator with wrong password
Verify no session cookie is set

expected_outcomes: Reject invalid password for Administrator succeeds

designs.title: Administrator redirects to /app after login
designs.description: Test that Administrator is directed to /app after successful login
expected_outcomes: Administrator redirects to /app after login succeeds

designs.title: Authenticated request succeeds for Administrator
designs.description: Test that requests with a valid session cookie succeed for Administrator
expected_outcomes: Authenticated request succeeds for Administrator succeeds

designs.title: Expired session rejected for Administrator
designs.description: Test that an expired or invalid session cookie is rejected

steps.rationale: Clear any session cookies from prior tests
Access page with invalid session (follows redirects)
Verify 401, redirect to login, or 403 forbidden

expected_outcomes: Expired session rejected for Administrator succeeds

designs.title: Logout clears session for Administrator
designs.description: Test that logout invalidates the session for Administrator

steps.rationale: Clear httpx cookie jar after logout
Verify session is invalid after logout

expected_outcomes: Logout clears session for Administrator succeeds
